action.reasoning: Observation: Best AP now 0.2191 (val 0.233) with FP(r2+r3,4096)+10 desc(4106-dim) + 2048/6-layer MLP+BN+drop0.1 after 120 epochs; recent runs show overfitting (low train loss 0.015, val plateau); no recent metrics.jsonl (old curves only, train.py truncated at loss func). Analysis: Adding desc helped slightly but capacity/schedule can be tuned for better generalization on imbalance (masked BCE+pos_weight good); full non-truncated train.py with mini-batching (bs=4096 for stability), seed=42, per-step+per-epoch jsonl logging (loss/val_ap/lr), grad_clip=1.0, lower lr=1.5e-4, dropout=0.05, layers=7, patience=20, 150 epochs will improve without PyG (still segfaults) or cache invalidation. Decision: Rewrite all files for complete robust code+logging+updated defaults (keep 10 desc/cache), train fully then submit_eval on best.pt to exceed 0.2191.
